sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93343" key="sarkoblasta/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σαρκο-βλαστάνω</orth>, <sense id="n93343.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">grow flesh</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.7</biblScope> </bibl> (<xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">σάρκα βλ</ref></xr>.).</sense> </entryFree>
